reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Los mecánicos y técnicos atienden muy bien. El personal administrativo en algunos sectores no tienen tan buena atención.  Pasaron la gomería (que estaba en el 2do piso) al primero y es un embrollo estacionar o moverse con el vehículo porque hay poco lugar para tantas especialidades. Antes estaba mejor

(Translated by Google)
The mechanics and technicians provide excellent service. The administrative staff in some departments aren't as helpful. They moved the tire shop (which was on the second floor) to the first floor, and it's a real hassle to park or move around with your vehicle because there's so little space for so many different services. It used to be better.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKNy0tZHBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre voy, me es molesto que me piden la credencial del Aca para el descuento en vez del dni. A veces se cuelga la app y no puedo acceder al descuento. Deberían revisarlo.

(Translated by Google)
I always go, but it bothers me that they ask for my ACA membership card for the discount instead of my ID. Sometimes the app crashes and I can't access the discount. They should look into it.
